name: Multi-Filter Alignment Verification of VLT Messier 12 Observations
description:
You need to verify the astrometric alignment between V-band and B-band observations of the globular cluster Messier 12 using AstroImageJ. Using the images located in ~/AstroImages/alignment_check/Vcomb.fits and Bcomb.fits, measure the pixel centroid coordinates (X, Y) for at least 5 identical, bright, isolated stars in both images. Calculate the pixel offsets (ΔX = X_B - X_V, ΔY = Y_B - Y_V), mean ΔX, mean ΔY, RMS offset, and maximum offset. Create a report file at ~/AstroImages/measurements/alignment_report.txt using the following format:

ALIGNMENT VERIFICATION REPORT
=============================
Number of stars measured: [N]
Mean X offset (pixels): [value]
Mean Y offset (pixels): [value]
RMS offset (pixels): [value]
Max offset (pixels): [value]
Assessment: [aligned or misaligned]

Mark the assessment as 'aligned' if the RMS offset is less than 1.5 pixels, otherwise 'misaligned'.
